scenario: Soft lockup or Hard lockup due to race between ring_buffer_detach() and ring_buffer_wakeup()
symptoms: NMI watchdog: BUG: soft lockup - CPU#0 stuck for 22s! [capsule8-sensor:2144]
NMI watchdog: Watchdog detected hard LOCKUP on cpu 23
Kernel panic - not syncing: softlockup: hung tasks

workflow.thought: Examine system information to understand the environment.
workflow.observation: Check DMI BIOS vendor, version, and date.

workflow.thought: Get backtrace of the panicked task to see call stack.
workflow.observation: Look for generic_exec_single+0xfa and perf_remove_from_context.

workflow.thought: Check backtrace of CPU 1 to see its state.
workflow.observation: Look for _raw_spin_lock_irqsave+0x26 and perf_event_wakeup loop.

workflow.thought: Disassemble __wake_up to see where panic occurred.
workflow.observation: Check if panic is at pop %r14 after spin_unlock_irqrestore.

workflow.thought: Filter backtrace to see exception RIP and IRQ stack.
workflow.observation: Identify __wake_up+0x49 and perf_event_wakeup frames.

workflow.thought: Disassemble irq_work_run to understand the loop.
workflow.observation: Examine irq_work_run_list and perf_pending_event calls.

workflow.thought: Check system info for load, node, release, panic, and CPUs.
workflow.action: sys | grep -i -e load -e node -e rel -e date -e panic -e cpus ;
workflow.observation: Look for Hard LOCKUP panic and CPU count.

workflow.thought: Search log for lockup messages.
workflow.observation: Confirm Watchdog detected hard LOCKUP on cpu.

workflow.thought: Evaluate binary value of RFLAGS to check interrupt state.
workflow.observation: Check bits set for interrupt flags.

workflow.thought: Disassemble perf_pending_event to see wakeup call.
workflow.observation: Look for callq to perf_event_wakeup.

workflow.thought: Disassemble perf_event_wakeup to see function prologue.
workflow.observation: Check push %r13 and other register saves.

workflow.thought: Calculate address to find perf_event structure.
workflow.observation: Get pointer to perf_event from stack.

workflow.thought: Read memory at calculated address to get perf_event.
workflow.observation: Verify ffff88206563d000 as perf_event address.

workflow.thought: Examine perf_event.pending field offset.
workflow.observation: Find irq_work pending structure offset.

workflow.thought: Inspect irq_work structure for function pointer.
workflow.observation: Check func points to perf_pending_event.

workflow.thought: Check perf_event.waitq field offset.
workflow.observation: Find wait_queue_head_t waitq offset.

workflow.thought: Examine wait queue to see if it's empty.
workflow.observation: Confirm wait queue is empty.

workflow.thought: Examine ring_buffer.event_list to check list state.
workflow.observation: Check if event_list is empty (next and prev are 0).

workflow.thought: Inspect wait_queue_head_t structure for lock state.
workflow.observation: Check lock counter and task_list pointers.

workflow.thought: Check perf_event.waitq field with offset in hex.
workflow.observation: Verify waitq address matches wake_up argument.

workflow.thought: Examine perf_event.rb_entry to see list pointers.
workflow.observation: Check if rb_entry points to itself, not initial rb.

root_cause_analysis: Below commit will fix this issue https://lore.kernel.org/patchwork/patch/465937/
